title: Better Handheld Items
description: Adjusts the position, rotation and scale of weapons, tools and items in first person view. Should work with most modded items and resourcepacks.
body:
This resourcepack changes the weapons, tools and items to have a more natural-looking position when held in your main or off-hand (in first person view). The 2D items face more towards the camera and the weapons and tools are no longer stuck to your face. See the screenshots to understand better.

Heavily inspired by [Gosha's RPG](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/goshas-rpg-first-person-pack)!

Note: Some items might be different in third person view as well.
